verdict_reason: New referenceNumber query param has no validation constraint, unlike every other reference-number parameter on this controller

todos.issue: referenceNumber is accepted with no @Pattern/@Size constraint even though every other reference-number parameter on this controller carries @Pattern(ReferenceNumberGenerator.REFERENCE_NUMBER_PATTERN), so arbitrary free text of unbounded length reaches the Mongo query
todos.fix: Decide the contract: either add @Pattern (and let the new ConstraintViolationException handler return 400) or document that free text deliberately yields an empty page and add @Size to cap length

todos.issue: The debug log line interpolates the raw referenceNumber query param, echoing unvalidated user input into logs
todos.fix: Drop referenceNumber from the log line or log it only once validated/trimmed by the service
